arm_definitions.pkf: PKF installed with adaptive retrieval and repository-local semantic closeout; an individual task may bypass retrieval.
arm_definitions.probe_only: Adaptive bounded local probe, with no PKF installed or available.
arm_definitions.source_only: No PKF and no adaptive local-probe instructions; generic source discovery only.

arm_definitions.pkf: PKF installed with adaptive retrieval and repository-local semantic closeout; an individual task may bypass retrieval.
arm_definitions.probe_only: Adaptive bounded local probe, with no PKF installed or available.
arm_definitions.source_only: No PKF and no adaptive local-probe instructions; generic source discovery only.

methodology.arm_order: three-arm Latin square and alternating two-arm phases
methodology.initialization_objective: maximize verified public-behavior and routing coverage while enforcing one final validation, opaque helpers, and bounded atomic routes; no historical cost target
methodology.performance_interpretation: phase-specific advisory targets remain separate from blocking quality gates; closeout is reported as a required maintenance premium
methodology.phase_cost_accounting: probe-only mutation measures implementation, isolated PKF closeout measures closeout, and integrated PKF mutation remains the observed combined total
methodology.trace_accounting: ordered tool events segmented into implementation, first valid route call, and post-route closeout; token and duration usage remain call-level

amortization.purpose: Break-even estimates relate setup and maintenance premiums to activated retrieval savings.

closeout.purpose: Required knowledge maintenance is measured as a maintenance premium.

cross_retrieval.purpose: Activated PKF should replace broad cross-capability discovery.

initialization.purpose: One-time setup is reported for coverage and runaway detection, not historical cost parity.

local_bypass.purpose: PKF-inactive local work should remain near probe-only cost.

mutation_implementation.purpose: Implementation stays source-first; closeout cost is attributed separately.
